[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011011100 5
1 001011111 6
2 111111010 7
3 011010110 5
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 001001000 2
7 100111110 6

01 10 101111110 7
12 21 100111111 7
23 32 101111001 6
34 43 111011101 7
45 54 011011111 7
56 65 111111111 a
67 76 111111110 8
70 07 011011110 6

13 31 101111111 8
24 42 011111101 7
35 53 101011111 7
46 64 111111110 8
57 75 011011111 7
60 06 111111010 7 match 2
71 17 111111110 8

14 41 111111110 8
25 52 001111111 7
36 63 111111011 8
47 74 011011110 6
50 05 001011111 6 match 1
61 16 111111110 8
72 27 011110111 7

15 51 101111111 8

37 73 111011111 8
